name: golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev
title: golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev
summary: Go package for embedding web resources into Go executables
description:
Go package for embedding web resources into Go executables
go.rice is a Golang package that makes working with resources such as
html, js, css, images and templates very easy. During development
go.rice will load required files directly from disk. Upon deployment
it is easy to add all resource files to a executable using the rice
tool, without changing the source code for your package. Several
methods are provided for adding resources to your binary by go.rice.
.
This package contains the development files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev because Go package for embedding web resources into Go executables.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-geertjohan-go.rice-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
